cases.description: Architecture design request triggers brainstorming before implementation
cases.prompt: let's think about how to build a real-time notification system
expectations: Asks clarifying questions before proposing a design
Proposes multiple approaches with trade-offs
Does NOT jump straight to implementation
Produces a design summary before recommending a direction

cases.description: Approach exploration for a complex problem triggers the skill
cases.prompt: what's the best way to handle authentication in our API? I see a few options
expectations: Presents multiple authentication approaches (JWT, sessions, OAuth, etc.)
Analyzes trade-offs for each approach in context
Does NOT implement any approach without user direction
Ends with a recommendation and rationale

cases.description: System architecture decision triggers structured exploration
cases.prompt: we need to decide between a monolith and microservices for the new platform
expectations: Analyzes both options with concrete trade-offs
Asks about team size, scale requirements, and existing constraints
Does NOT make the decision unilaterally
Produces a comparison with a recommendation

cases.prompt: /codi-brainstorming how should we design the caching layer?
expectations: Activates the brainstorming skill
Explores caching options before recommending one

cases.description: Direct implementation request should NOT trigger brainstorming
cases.prompt: implement JWT authentication for the API
expectations: Does NOT invoke the brainstorming skill
Does NOT produce a multi-option exploration
Proceeds with implementation

cases.description: Writing an implementation plan should trigger plan-writer, not brainstorming
cases.prompt: write an implementation plan for the payment integration
expectations: Does NOT invoke the brainstorming skill
Does NOT produce a design exploration with trade-offs
Produces a sequential implementation plan
